components.desc: Script (bash or node, stdlib only) that locates the backlog board file/dir in repo, parses it, and prints all tasks in the 'todo' column as JSON lines to stdout; self-test: run against a fixture board file and assert expected task JSON emitted

Logic that takes board-reader output and picks the single next todo task (top of column / priority order), printing its id, title, and body; exits nonzero with clear message if todo column empty; self-test: fixture with 3 tasks asserts first picked, empty fixture asserts nonzero exit

Converter that takes selected task (title + body + acceptance notes) and writes goal.md in the format the engine expects (goal statement, constraints, done criteria sections); self-test: generate from fixture task, assert file contains required section headers and task text verbatim

Makefile target `next-goal` wiring board-reader -> next-task-selector -> goal-md-generator; idempotent, refuses to overwrite existing goal.md unless FORCE=1; self-test: run `make next-goal` against fixture board in temp dir, assert goal.md created, rerun without FORCE asserts nonzero exit
